---
title: "Homework 8"
author: "T.J. Seislove"
date: "3/23/2026"
output:
  html_document:
      code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(mosaic)
library(janitor)
library(knitr)
```

# Data Import

```{r}
StudentSurvey <- Lock5Data::StudentSurvey
```

# BMI Calculation & Categorization

```{r}
StudentSurvey <- StudentSurvey %>% mutate(
  BMI = 701 * Weight / (Height)^2,
) %>% select(Sex, Height, Weight, BMI)

head(StudentSurvey) %>% kable()
```

^[Problem 1 Complete]

```{r}
StudentSurvey <- StudentSurvey %>% mutate(
  Category = cut(
    BMI, c(-Inf, 18.5, 24.9, 29.9, Inf), labels = c("Underweight", "Healthy Weight", "Overweight", "Obese")
  )
)

head(StudentSurvey) %>% kable()
```

^[Problem 2 Complete]
